# testing/utility/reflect.utility

Generic reflection helpers for safe property access, type guards, and HTTP header extraction.

## Functions

| Function                                            | Description                                                                 |
| --------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [getObjectProperty](functions/getObjectProperty.md) | Safely reads a property from an unknown value using reflection.             |
| [getStringProperty](functions/getStringProperty.md) | Reads a string property from an unknown value using reflection.             |
| [getSessionId](functions/getSessionId.md)           | Extracts the `Mcp-Session-Id` header from an HTTP request.                  |
| [toResponseBody](functions/toResponseBody.md)       | Converts an unknown value to a plain key-value record via `Object.entries`. |
| [isFunctionValue](functions/isFunctionValue.md)     | Type guard that checks whether an unknown value is a function.              |
